/**

function solve(chunks, queries) {
    // 1. Concatenate chunks to form s
    const s = chunks.join('');

    // 2. Tokenize s into words. Based on analysis of examples, a "word"

    // All other characters (spaces, hyphens, etc.) act as delimiters.
    // s.match(/[a-z]+/g) extracts all sequences of one or more lowercase letters.
    const words = s.match(/[a-z]+/g) || [];

    // 3. Count the frequency of each word found in s
    const wordCounts = new Map();
    for (const word of words) {
        wordCounts.set(word, (wordCounts.get(word) || 0) + 1);
    }

    // 4. Generate the result array by counting occurrences for each query
    const ans = [];
    for (const query of queries) {

        ans.push(wordCounts.get(query) || 0);
    }

    return ans;
}

find_word_recursive_helper([C|_], Acc) when not is_letter(C) ->

    % Keep building the sequence (Seq is built in reverse)
    extract_run_internal(Rest, [C|Seq]);
extract_run_internal([_C|Rest], Seq) ->

extract_sequences([C|Rest], Acc) ->
    if is_letter(C) ->
        % Find the full sequence starting at C
        {Sequence, Remaining} = extract_run([C|Rest]);
        % Recurse on the remaining part
        extract_sequences(Remaining, [Sequence|Acc]);
    true ->
        % C is a delimiter, skip it
        extract_sequences(Rest, Acc)
    end.

% Helper to find an entry for a word in the frequency list
find_entry(Acc, Word) ->
    lists:foldl(fun(Found, Pair) ->
        case Pair of
            {W, C} when W == Word -> {true, C};
            _ -> Found
        end
    end, error, Acc).

% Helper to count word frequencies using an association list
count_frequencies(Words) ->
    lists:foldl(fun(Acc, Word) ->
        case find_entry(Acc, Word) of
            {true, OldCount} -> 
                % Word found, update count by replacing the old pair
                lists:replace(Acc, {Word, OldCount}, {Word, OldCount + 1});
            error -> 
                % Word not found, insert new entry
                [{Word, 1} | Acc]
        end

    S = lists:join(Chunks),

% Checks if a byte (integer value) is a lowercase letter ('a' through 'z').
is_lower_letter(Byte) when is_integer(Byte) ->
    Byte >= 97 and Byte =< 122;
is_lower_letter(_Other) ->
    false.

% Extracts all maximal contiguous sequences of lowercase letters (words) from a binary string.
extract_words(Binary) ->
    extract_words_recursive(Binary, [])
    where
        % State: (Remaining Binary, Accumulated Words List)
        extract_words_recursive(<<B/binary>>, Acc) when is_list(B) ->
            case process_bytes(B, [], Acc) of
                {Rest, FoundWords} ->
                    extract_words_recursive(Rest, FoundWords)
            end;
        extract_words_recursive(<</binary>>, Acc) ->
            Acc.

        process_bytes([], CurrentWord, Acc) ->
            case CurrentWord of
                [] -> {[], Acc};
                _ -> {[], [CurrentWord | Acc]}
            end;

        process_bytes(<<Byte/binary>>, CurrentWord, Acc) ->
            if is_lower_letter(Byte) ->

                    _ ->

                        {<</binary>>, FinalAcc}
                end.

% Counts the frequency of each word. Returns a map: WordBinary -> Count.
count_frequencies(WordsList) ->
    lists:foldl(count_reducer, #{}, WordsList)
    where
        count_reducer(Map, Word) ->
            case maps:get(Word, Map) of
                {Count} when is_integer(Count) ->
                    maps:put(Word, Count + 1, Map);
                _ ->
                    maps:put(Word, 1, Map)
            end.

% Looks up the count for a query in the frequency map.
lookup_count(Map, Query) ->
    case maps:get(Query, Map) of
        {Count} when is_integer(Count) ->

        _ ->

    end.
